data.content: Implementation complete on branch feat/foolery-1a2d-beat-update-latency (commit 68a7a5d6b4c1). Centralized all ad-hoc beat query invalidation across 6 source files to use invalidateBeatListQueries(queryClient) from beat-query-cache.ts, which uses refetchType:'active' for immediate refresh of mounted observers (<1s). Fixed missing beat list invalidation on add-dependency mutation in use-beat-detail-data.ts. Added beat-invalidation-consistency.test.ts (7 tests) to guard against regression. All quality gates pass: lint clean, typecheck clean, 213 test files / 2411 tests pass, build succeeds. No changes to polling intervals — background 10s polling unaffected.
